top_signals.title: Putin, Xi meet to reaffirm ties days after Trump's visit
top_signals.summary: Called a “dear friend” by the Russian president, Xi Jinping stepped up his appeal for a Mideast ceasefire, days after the Chinese leader hosted US President Donald Trump in Beijing. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Nickel Extends Gains After Indonesia Confirms Export Controls
top_signals.summary: Nickel extended gains for a third day after Indonesia confirmed it will tighten control over some of the country’s biggest commodities exports, including some forms of the metal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Vance defends stock-trading spree in Trump financial filings: 'Come on, man'
top_signals.summary: Vice President JD Vance said at the White House on Tuesday that he and President Donald Trump both support banning congressional stock trading.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
